name: deepcode
description: DeepCode - 轻量级 AI Agent 代码工作台

scripts.tauri:dev:deepcode-gui: pnpm build:deepcode-gui && pnpm --filter @deepcode/deepcode-gui-shell prepare:dist && pnpm --filter @deepcode/deepcode-gui-shell tauri:dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @deepcode/protocol build && pnpm --filter @deepcode/session-core build && pnpm --filter @deepcode/client build && cargo build --workspace
scripts.build:deepcode-gui: pnpm --filter @deepcode/protocol build && pnpm --filter @deepcode/session-core build && pnpm --filter @deepcode/client build:deepcode-gui
scripts.build:tauri:deepcode-gui: pnpm build:deepcode-gui && pnpm --filter @deepcode/deepcode-gui-shell prepare:dist && pnpm --filter @deepcode/deepcode-gui-shell tauri:build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @deepcode/protocol typecheck && pnpm --filter @deepcode/session-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @deepcode/client typecheck
